reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed the Steam Version of the game, so decided to pick it up. I initially thought I might face motion sickness like other racing, fortunately didn't have any of those issues with it here. Absolutely loved the Car Wash Mode, spent a good bit of time just washing cars even when they were clean. I also enjoyed some of the game modes that were there in the PC version from a unique perspective.

I know that the developer consistently updates the game on Steam quite often. Hoping that this version is no different and has a tons of new updates.

If you enjoy Micro Machines and Mini Motor Racing on Oculus, definitely give it a try.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your support of our indie game. We're glad you're enjoying the game so far. We have a new update launching soon with fixes for the motion sickness, and fixes for a few minor issues.
Apart from the fixes, the game will feature a brand new Arena Combat mode. We can't wait to show it to you soon.
